creator: alex@niksun.com
text:
The release/amd64/mkisoimages.sh script is suppose to support an extra-bits-dir argument.  Because the script now uses makefs instead of mkisofs, extra-bits-dir is no longer supported.

Patch below.

Fix: Patch submitted for review.  Patch honors an extra-bits-dir argument before creating the ISO.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Call mkisoimages.sh with an extra argument results in failure.
